landing.subtitle: Real focus, concrete proof, alone or with other people focusing together in real time.
landing.feature_pomodoro_desc: Guided work and break cycles that cut the hesitation and push you to start right now.
landing.plans_subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when focus becomes a habit and you want to go further.
landing.plan_free_desc: For people who want to try it and start getting clarity on their own time.
landing.plan_pro_desc: For people serious about productivity who want to grow along with their group.
landing.plan_premium_desc: For community creators, teams and anyone who wants to pull others into focus.
landing.hero_subtitle: Time your real work, drop into flow with ambient sounds and end the day with proof of what you actually got done.
landing.problem_1_desc: You close the laptop thinking you were busy, but can't say on what. Hours leak out and nothing sticks.
landing.problem_2_desc: You opened it to study, lost two hours in the feed and still feel drained. Fake effort is exhausting too.
landing.problem_3_title: You work hard, but have no proof
landing.problem_3_desc: No data, no history, nothing real to show yourself, your client, or your future self at the end of the week.
landing.solution_subtitle: A system that measures what you actually do, drops you into flow and connects you with other people focusing live, right now.
landing.feature_smart_timer_desc: Start in one click, split by project and tag, and see exactly where your time is going every single day.
landing.feature_sounds_title: The right environment to quiet the noise
landing.feature_sounds_desc_full: Rain, forest, café, lo-fi and more. Sounds that mute the world outside and keep you inside the work.
landing.feature_goals_title: Goals that pull you forward daily
landing.feature_goals_desc: Set daily and weekly targets, watch your bar fill and feel progress turn into a real habit.
landing.feature_history_desc_full: Full session history, filters by project and date, CSV or PDF export to show exactly what you did.
landing.feature_achievements_title: Your consistency turned into something alive
landing.feature_achievements_desc: Watch your tree grow with every hour, keep streaks, unlock milestones and celebrate who you are becoming.
landing.how_step_1_desc: Sign up in seconds, no card required. Free forever, with everything you need to actually start focusing.
landing.how_step_2_desc: Create projects, set goals, pick your sounds. In a few minutes your environment is ready for deep work.
landing.how_step_3_desc: Hit play, hold the rhythm and watch your tree, streaks and reports grow alongside you.
landing.final_cta_title: Stop assuming you were productive. Start proving it.
landing.final_cta_subtitle: Join thousands of people who use TimeZoni every day to focus with method, alongside others, and turn effort into real results.

projects.title: Projects & Categories
projects.subtitle: Organize your work into categories and projects

projects.category_hint: Categories are broad groups like 'Work', 'Studies' or 'Personal'. Create categories first to organize your projects.
projects.project_hint: Projects are specific tasks or activities like 'Math', 'Monthly Report' or 'Project X'. Each project can have its own color.
projects.create_category_first_desc: For better organization, we recommend creating at least one category before adding projects. Go to the 'Categories' tab to get started.
projects.category_default_color: Default color for projects in this category
projects.category_create_desc: Categories group similar projects. E.g.: 'Studies' can contain 'Math', 'English', etc.
projects.project_create_desc: Projects are the activities you'll track. Each project can have its own color.
projects.edit_category_desc: Change the category name or color.
projects.edit_project_desc: Change the project name, color or category.
projects.category_examples: 💡 Create categories like 'Work', 'Studies', 'Personal' to organize your projects.
projects.limit_reached_desc: Free plan allows up to 3 projects. Upgrade to create more.

notes.remove_password_warning: This will remove the password protection. Anyone with access to your account will be able to see these notes.
